column2: add
add
black
I return to the center of the cold drawer.
I hear neither the sound of the wind nor the waves lapping the shore. Only the terrible silence of the drawer.
Even the faint sound of my heartbeat feels like it might stop at any moment.
room
There is someone new in the drawer.
(Should I go talk to them like I always do...?)
I get up and try to walk over.
But I can't find the strength. I fall on my knees and then on to the floor.
day
The wood is hard. Maybe I'll just lie down forever...
kazu
Hey.
Heeey, you alright over there? I heard a huge thump.
You're not hurt, are you? I'll head over now to check on you! Don't force yourself to move or anything. Just wait right there.
I hear loud, heavy footsteps. The footsteps of somebody who isn't used to living here yet.
kazu
kazu
How are you doing? I'm Kazu. It's nice to meet you. Are you doing okay?
kazu
You look like you're down in the dumps. Why are you so depressed?
Sorry.
kazu
Huh? You don't have to apologize.
kazu
Oh, could you tell me your name? We'll be living here together, so I'm sure it'll come in handy.
Rin.

column1: # クララがリンを捜索していた、という話外の世界で広まっているため

column2: kazu
Rin! So, you're Rin. I guess you're the type that's popular with the ladies nowadays.
kazu
Ah, don't worry about that. Just talking to myself.
Sorry to ask you this when you're down, but could you help me out a bit?
kazu
I'm trying to profile Saeko. Wait, do I need to explain what profiling is? You know what I mean, don't you?
You don't know? My bad! Profiling is when you use things around a person to analyze their personality.
I want you to help me find something that'll help me understand her! Something she's used for a long time, which might show what she likes. That'd be perfect.
The newcomer, Kazu, wants me to find something that will show what Saeko likes. Apparently, he wants to profile her... But is there any point?
kazu
Hey, Rin. Where on earth are you headed?
kazu
I know you're tired, but I want you to bring me something. Help a man out!
back
I look at what I have in my hands. How would this help somebody understand Saeko?
(This is a pain. I want to just give him something and get this over with, but...)
kazu
I glance at Kazu. His eyes are filled with anticipation.
(I guess I should do this properly.)
back
...Here.
kazu
Oh, thanks! I know you're tired--I appreciate it. An iPod, eh?
It's not as good as a cell phone, but it's still perfect for profiling. Music really shows a person's interests, you know.
kazu
Hmm, let's look at the song list... Oh, I see...
kazu
Hm... Oh-ho... Interesting...
kazu
Well, that's just what I expected. There aren't any popular J-pop songs in here. No artists like SNAP or Azumi Hamamatsu.
Only boring nameless instrumental songs. It fits right with the image of a lonely and introverted girl.
Thank you, Rin. By the by, you've been here for a while, right? What kind of girl does Saeko look like to you?
...Who knows?
kazu
My, what happened to you? Oh, I know. You must have suffered from being here for so long.
kazu
...But you don't have to worry. Saeko will be caught soon. Help will be here shortly.
...And?
kazu
"And?" That's all you have to say? Here I thought you'd be crying in happiness.
kazu
But let's put that aside for now. I'm actually a magazine reporter, and for a while, I've been following a series of disappearances... the Vanishing Incidents.
I'd gone to the house of somebody relevant to the case for an interview, but I ended up getting caught myself.
Somebody relevant to the case...?
kazu
Oh, do you want to know? Of course, I mean Saeko. I say relevant, but the police are already calling her the culprit internally.
kazu
You'll recall the incident three days ago where the Kotobishi girl vanished. That really got the investigation going.
kazu
I mean, she's the daughter of a very wealthy family. Even when she's walking around alone, she always has undercover security watching her.
kazu
When she disappeared, there wasn't anybody suspicious nearby, or any cars. Just a female university student.
No matter how you look at it, that girl's suspicious.
But I can't believe somebody who'd covered her tracks so well is getting caught so easily...
kazu
It's still not clear how she does it, and there's no warrant or evidence...
kazu
But this is a clue for the Vanishing Incidents that have been tormenting the cops for years. They can't let this go.
The investigation's perfect and the media are already in on it. The first search will probably start tomorrow morning.
kazu
So? I bet you're pleased as punch. You'll finally be free! You can go see your family on the outside.
kazu
Or do you have a case of that--what's it called? Stockholm syndrome? If so, your head must be whirling right now.
...I got it, but you're too loud. Could you go away for now?
kazu
Hmph... It looks like you're in need of some counseling.
kazu
Well, I'm sure you need some time to organize your thoughts. I'll leave you alone for now.
kazu
But come back when you've calmed down! The last act begins tomorrow morning, and I'm getting an interview with you before then!
After shouting that, Kazu walks away.
I throw my back on to the flat floor and lie down. With Chio and Clara gone, the drawer feels multiple times larger than usual.
Kazu frowns as he fiddles with the iPod in the distance. It has a playlist full of boring nameless songs that he can't understand.
According to him, the outside world is coming for Saeko, and the police will search the premises tomorrow morning.
That means, if I live through this night, Saeko will be caught tomorrow morning...
(...Then what?)
(If I can go back to the outside world... What happens next?)
(Plus, there are the others. And Saeko. What happens to us?)
day
(Honestly, I don't want to think about anything.)
(If I could just disappear from this world, one sense blurring away at a time...)
akari
...Rin.
Morning. Were you listening to that guy?
That guy?
akari
Yeah, that shady man calling himself a magazine reporter. I told him to get lost, but he kept talking to me anyway.
He wore me down, and I ended up telling him what Saeko's done to me. He got all worked up. Said it was the obscenest torture in all of human history...
akari
...Rin, what are you going to do with him?
What...?
akari
I hate him. I wish he'd die.
Why don't you give him that cake? Tell him it's a present. Then it'd be curtains for him this evening.
akari
He can get worked up all he wants in Saeko's stomach. "EXCLUSIVE! View From the Delicate Insides of a Giant Man-Eating Girl" or whatever.
He can come up with a sensational title while shoulder-deep in stomach acid, but he can't think his way out of his brain cells getting melted.
akari
The police are coming tomorrow morning. The two of us can escape then. He won't even leave a body. What do you think? The perfect plan, right?
akari
...Hey, Rin. What did you think of what I said just now?
Um... About what to do with Kazu?
akari
No.
akari
Even if we get out of here, we can't have a happy ending.
I don't plan on lecturing you. I hate lectures myself.
akari
But if tomorrow comes and we get out of here safely... Can you really accept that? Can you return to your past life just like that?
akari
Just think about it.
The things you did here. How you might be able to get out of here tomorrow. And your current relationship with Saeko.
Then...
What do you think you should do now?
akari
...Anyway, that's all I wanted to say.
Think for yourself and make a decision that you can accept. I don't care even if we all end up dead because of it.
The time for me to feed somebody as the supervisor has come... The rules: Make a little person have at least 50 Appeal. Make sure no little people have 0 or worse Health. What should I do?
I pick up the cake and approach Kazu.
day
...Kazu. Could you eat this for me?
kazu
Oh! Oh-ho!
Thank you. I've had my eye on this since I got here. I've got a real sweet tooth, you see...
kazu_eating_cake
remove
Kazu finishes speaking and puts his mouth on the sponge cake. The sweet smell of whipped cream fills the drawer.
kazu
I can't believe how huge this cake is. I could eat all day and I still wouldn't finish. This is heaven...
kazu
You could make a business out of shrinking people. I'm sure everyone's dreamed about a bathtub full of pudding.
After this whole thing is over and we find out how Saeko shrinks people, people could pay to get shrunk.
kazu
You'd be able to eat your favorite snacks and fancy restaurant food hundreds of times larger than you... It'd be a riot!
akari
Interesting. You might even get eaten by accident.
kazu
Wh-What are you saying? I heard all about your titillating experiences earlier, Akari, b-but that's just...
akari
...Rin. This is your choice.
akari
I...expected a different outcome. But your choice is...
akari
It's fine. I'm used to this.
akari
We just have to wait for the usual routine now.
akari
Kazu, sorry for cutting you off. I'll keep out of your way until you die, so rant all you want.
kazu
Wha... Huh?!
kazu
Until I d-die? What are you saying?!
kazu
N-Now that I think about it, if this drawer's where everyone in the Vanishing Incidents has ended up, aren't there too few people here?
I know Saeko has a personality problem, b-but where has everyone gone?!
kazu
Hundreds--no, thousands--of people have disappeared over the years! It's a huge case! Wh-Why are there o-only three people here?!
Kazu's voice gets louder as he starts making a fuss.
What happened to everyone?! Rin, don't just keep your mouth shut. Say something!
Just as Kazu begins to shake my shoulders while wailing--
next

column1: # アカリは元の魅力が5なので、ケーキで魅力を+35しても食べられない。よって、誰も殺さない選択になる

column2: I pick up the cake and approach Akari.
When I walk close enough to see her face, she smiles in satisfaction.
akari
...Teehee. You thought this through, Rin. I think this is the right choice too.
akari
But I haven't seen a cake in a while... This looks really sweet.
akari_eating_cake
AKARI_EATS_CAKE
remove
day
As Akari speaks, she puts her mouth on the edge of the cake. The sweet smell of whipped cream fills the drawer.
One, two, then three bites... While at first she seemed to be holding back, she starts eating faster and faster.
Before I know it, the huge cake has disappeared, leaving only Akari, who lies down with a contented smile.
akari
Ah, I'm so happy... I feel incredible.
akari
My head feels so light... I don't care even if I die like this.
akari
What? Why do you keep looking at me? You can look all you want, but I'm not saying anything.
I stare at the humongous object in my hand.
I'm used to my work as the supervisor by now, so I already know. This object won't raise anybody's Appeal.
(I know. Giving this to somebody won't mean anything to Saeko. But that's why I'm doing it.)
(That way I won't have to choose anyone today...)
My eyes happen to meet Akari's as she stands by the wall.
akari
day
I think that's the correct choice too.
My eyes happen to meet Akari's as she stands by the wall.
akari
(She keeps looking at me, then looking around the drawer... I wonder if she wants something.)
(It's fine. I still have time. I'll think some more about what the correct choice is...)
3_fail
back
akari
You decided not to give anybody to Saeko today, didn't you?
akari
That's what I thought you should do too.
Well, it might just get us killed, but I have no regrets.
...At least we can acknowledge our own sins this way.
...Yeah.
...I'm sure of it.
By acknowledging my sin of killing the other little people, I can finally move forward.
akari
...Teehee. That's enough talking. Let's wait for Saeko to come back.
akari
I'm heading to bed. Go somewhere else.
Akari leaves it at that and lies down right there. I hear her breaths soften into sleep, as if nothing had happened...
I've been watching her body rise and fall rhythmically for a few minutes, when--
room
A low, muffled vibration reverberates from a distance. The sound of heavy footsteps.
room
There's no mistaking it. Saeko has returned to her room.
room
Saeko walks through the room with even breaths. Every step she takes shakes the drawer like an earthquake...
room
Each tremor growing larger and more violent than the last.
room
Soon, they become too strong for me to stand.
I find myself crouching on the floor.
Next, I hear the creak of something moving.
Then, a tremendous commotion that shakes the whole room...
...as the room we're in--the second drawer of a desk--is pried open by Saeko's fingers.
day
shift
open_sliding_in
serious
Hello, cute little people. Were you good today while I was away?
...A lot happened today. I'm tired.
I'll have my portion for today now.
serious
Saeko's hand comes down into the drawer.
Her unthinkably large fingers fill our vision.
They wander for just a moment, as if carefully making a decision...
And then return to the sky, empty-handed.
serious
...Hey, Rin.
Nobody in here looks yummy. Why?
day
I thought this was right.
I've been a terrible person up until now.
Tricking others, raising their Appeal, and feeding them to you...
I'd even started to enjoy it.
You're awful, but I've been just as awful.
I know I won't be forgiven even if I stop now. I'll have to be punished.
But I finally realized my own sins...
So I can't give you any more people.
grumpy
...What?
Do you understand what you're saying? I could crush you under my finger like a bug.
Don't go against my orders. Just act like a doll and do what I say without thinking.
What I mean...
tearful
What I mean is that you haven't done anything wrong.
You're just as bad as me? You don't need to say that.
...I don't want to hear it!
tearful
teardrop
tearful
side_closed

Ahaha... For some reason, I'm no longer hungry. You'll live to see another day.
Enjoy it while you can. You'll only live until tomorrow night...
Until tomorrow...
side
...I want to think about something. Bye.
night
And then, they stop. Right in front of Kazu.
W-Wait! Saeko, what are you doing?
serious
Her gigantic fingers wrap around Kazu's tiny arms and legs...
serious
...and carry him up into the sky.
Hey, you have to be kidding me! Don't tell me all the Vanishing Incident victims...
serious
They can't have all...been e-eaten...by Saeko...
serious
H-Help me! Please! Just until tomorrow morning--that'll be enough!
Th-Then I'll be fine! I know it! J-Just let me go for now--
eat

swallow

Hmm... Mediocre.
